1782240446.MESSAGE: She wandered forever to find him. Her home. Her savior.

1782240797.MESSAGE: He stood far back, deep in the woods. He knew she was looking for him, but he wasn't sure how he could come out after all this time.

1782242005.MESSAGE: She smells him. she always does, he smells like dark moonlight and the core of everything right in the world.

1782242097.MESSAGE: He stares, he cannot believe she is actually returning to him. He believed he would have to go alone.
